title: cacalia leucocephala
intro: Cacalia leucocephala, also known as White Borneo, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The medicinal properties of Cacalia leucocephala have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cacalia leucocephala can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional folk medicine.
